prompt: Ultra-premium cinematic commercial product photography. The product is hero-centered on a beautifully textured natural pedestal that complements its identity. Dramatic studio-quality lighting with soft volumetric rays, rich atmospheric depth, subtle floating particles, premium reflections, realistic condensation or texture details where appropriate, and perfectly balanced highlights. Surround the product with carefully styled ingredients, materials, or visual elements that naturally represent its category without overpowering the composition. Shallow depth of field with creamy bokeh, ultra-realistic textures, luxurious color grading, clean premium branding visibility, elegant composition, photorealistic, macro-level detail, high-end advertising campaign aesthetic, award-winning product photography, 8K, HDR, ultra sharp focus, realistic shadows, global illumination, ray tracing, editorial luxury commercial, minimal yet sophisticated environment, visually striking, premium lifestyle brand aesthetic.
promptEn: Ultra-premium cinematic commercial product photography. The product is hero-centered on a beautifully textured natural pedestal that complements its identity. Dramatic studio-quality lighting with soft volumetric rays, rich atmospheric depth, subtle floating particles, premium reflections, realistic condensation or texture details where appropriate, and perfectly balanced highlights. Surround the product with carefully styled ingredients, materials, or visual elements that naturally represent its category without overpowering the composition. Shallow depth of field with creamy bokeh, ultra-realistic textures, luxurious color grading, clean premium branding visibility, elegant composition, photorealistic, macro-level detail, high-end advertising campaign aesthetic, award-winning product photography, 8K, HDR, ultra sharp focus, realistic shadows, global illumination, ray tracing, editorial luxury commercial, minimal yet sophisticated environment, visually striking, premium lifestyle brand aesthetic.
promptZh: 超高端电影级商业产品摄影。 产品位于中心位置，放置在与其特质相得益彰的精美纹理天然底座上。 戏剧性的影棚级灯光，带有柔和的体积光束、丰富的氛围深度、细腻的漂浮微粒、高级的反射效果、适宜的逼真冷凝水珠或纹理细节，以及完美平衡的高光。 在产品周围环绕 精心设计的配料、材质或能够自然代表其类别的视觉元素，且不喧宾夺主。 浅景深带来奶油般的虚化效果，超逼真的纹理，奢华的色彩分级，清晰的高端品牌视觉呈现，优雅的构图，照片级真实感，微距级细节，高端广告大片美学，获奖级产品摄影，8K 分辨率，HDR，超清晰对焦，逼真的阴影，全局光照，光线追踪，编辑级奢华商业风，极简而精致的环境，视觉冲击力强，高端生活方式品牌美学。
